# matomo_tagmanager_contexts (Data Source)

Lists every Tag Manager context (e.g. "web", "amp") this Matomo instance supports.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matomo_tagmanager_contexts" "all" {}

output "available_contexts" {
  value = [for c in data.matomo_tagmanager_contexts.all.contexts : c.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `contexts` (Attributes List) Every available context. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contexts))
- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier for this data source, always "contexts".

<a id="nestedatt--contexts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contexts`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The context's id, e.g. "web".
- `name` (String) The context's display name.
